title: Fabricord
description: A modern message style like DiscordSRV will be reproduced as a Fabric version mod.
body:
## 🔹 Fabricord – The easiest way to **bridge your Fabric server chat with Discord**! 🔹

**If you have any feature suggestions, feel free to reach out via Issues, PR, or Discord!**
**For bug reports or improvements, submit feedback on [GitHub](https://github.com/ririf4/Fabricord/issues)!**

### ⚠️ **This project is NOT affiliated with the Fabricord mod on CurseForge.**

---

## 🌟 **What is Fabricord?**
Fabricord is a **Fabric-based alternative to DiscordSRV**, designed to seamlessly bridge Minecraft server chat with Discord channels.

### 🔥 **Why Use Fabricord?**
✅ **Sync chats** between your Fabric server and Discord effortlessly  
✅ **Lightweight & Optimized** – No unnecessary bloat, just what you need  
✅ **Modern, visually appealing message style**  
✅ **Easy user mentions system** – Supports role & user ID tagging  
✅ **Death & achievement notifications** to Discord  

---

## 📥 **Installation Guide**
Setting up Fabricord is quick and easy:
1. **Install the mod** on your Fabric server and start it once  
   - A configuration file (`config.yml`) will be auto-generated  
2. **Edit `config.yml`** in `server-root/fabricord`  
   - Enter your **BotToken** & **LogChannelID**  
3. **Restart your server**, and you're good to go! 🎉  

---

## 💖 **Support Fabricord!**
If you enjoy using Fabricord, consider **leaving a tip** or **following the project** to support future updates! 🚀  
Your support helps keep this mod alive and improving.  

---

## 📜 **License & Additional Info**
Fabricord is available under the **[Apache License](https://github.com/K-Lqrs/Fabricord/blob/main/LICENSE).**  
Check out our GitHub repository for source code & contributions.  

---
